title: Scoped personal access tokens (Beta)
body: You can now limit the permissions of personal access tokens by selecting a token type and adding API scopes. This restricts each token to only the API operations you specify. See [Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)](/aws/en/dev-tools/auth/pat). This feature is in Beta.

ref_links.text: Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy)
